zh.lifeSummary: 當Ann Harmon於1558年出生在英國奧可福爾哈爾波利時，她的父親William Harmon30歲，母親Ann Clayton23歲。她於1587年與William Gibbons在英國奧可福爾迪其利結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1641年在英國英格蘭肯特坎特布瑞享年83歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特坎特布瑞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ann Harmon于1558年出生在英国奧可福爾哈爾波利时，她的父亲William Harmon30岁，母亲Ann Clayton23岁。她于1587年与William Gibbons在英国奧可福爾迪其利结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1641年在英国英格兰肯特坎特布瑞享年83岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特坎特布瑞。

nameMeanings.name: Harmon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Anglo-Norman French and Middle English personal name Herman, adopted from ancient Germanic Hariman, Her(e)man, composed of elements meaning ‘army’ + ‘man’.
Americanized form of German   Harmann   or   Hermann  . Compare   Harman  .

variants.name: Harmond
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Harmon  .

variants.name: Hargadon
meanings: Irish (Sligo): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hArgadáin ‘descendant of Argadán’, a personal name from a diminutive of argad ‘silver’. In Galway the traditional form O'Hargadan has tended to be replaced by Hardeman, and elsewhere in Ireland by Harman and Harmon .

variants.name: Harmony
meanings: Variant of   Harmon  , a surname of German origin.
English: unexplained. This surname is very rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Ann Harmon was born in 1558, in Charlbury, Oxfordshire, England, her father, William Harmon, was 30 and her mother, Ann Clayton, was 23. She married William Gibbons in 1587, in Ditchley, Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1641, in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 83, and was buried in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ann Harmon est née en 1558, à Charlbury, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, William Harmon, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Ann Clayton, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé William Gibbons en 1587, à Ditchley, Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1641, à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterrée à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ann Harmon 1558 in Charlbury, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Harmon 30 und ihre Mutter Ann Clayton 23. Sie hat 1587 in Ditchley, Oxfordshire, England William Gibbons geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1641 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ann Harmon è nata il nel 1558 nel Charlbury, Oxfordshire, England, sua padre, William Harmon, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Ann Clayton, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato William Gibbons nel 1587, nel Ditchley, Oxfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1641, nel Canterbury, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 83 anni, e fu sepolta a Canterbury, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ann Harmonが1558年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアチャールブリーで生まれた時，父William Harmonは30歳，母Ann Claytonは23歳であった。1587年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアディトチリーでWilliam Gibbonsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1641年にイギリスイギリスケントカンテルブリーで83歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントカンテルブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ann Harmon(이)가 1558년 영국 스퍼드실르 찰버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Harmon(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ann Clayton(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1587년 영국 스퍼드실르 딧클리에서 William Gibbons(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1641년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 캉르버이에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 캉르버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ann Harmon nasceu em 1558, em Charlbury, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Harmon, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Ann Clayton, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com William Gibbons em 1587, em Ditchley, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1641, em Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 83 anos, e foi sepultada em Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ann Harmon родилась в 1558 г. в местности чарлбури, оксфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Harmon было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Ann Clayton, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Gibbons в 1587 г. в местности дичли, оксфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1641 г. в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 83 лет и была похоронена в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ann Harmon nació en 1558, en Charlbury, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Harmon, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Ann Clayton, tenía 23 años. Se casó con William Gibbons en 1587, en Ditchley, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1641, en Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 83 años, y fue sepultada en Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
